summary: All requirements for user profile pages have been successfully implemented. The diff includes a new ProfilePage component (REQ-8), public profile query hook (REQ-12), backend getPublicProfile function (REQ-10), clickable seller links in ItemCard and ItemDetailPage (REQ-11), and a 'View Profile' navigation link in the header (REQ-13). The profile page displays seller information, active listings in a grid layout (REQ-9), and all acceptance criteria are met with proper routing, loading states, error handling, and wizarding theme styling.
